Welcome to Mashobs

A family-run guest house, made for the journey

Mashobs Guest House is a family-run guest house in eSicabazini, Manguzi, in the far north of KwaZulu-Natal. We offer clean, contemporary self-catering rooms built around one simple idea — that travellers passing through this beautiful corner of the country deserve a comfortable, secure place to rest.

Whether you're heading to Kosi Bay, on safari at Tembe Elephant Park, diving at Sodwana, or crossing into Mozambique, every room comes with a private bathroom, a kitchenette and a good night's sleep — with friendly local hosts on hand around the clock. It's the kind of place you'll want to come back to on every trip.

Professionally managed

Friendly local hosts, available around the clock to help you settle in.

Honest, affordable rates

Comfortable rooms at fair prices, with direct booking and no hidden fees.

An easy, well-signed stop

Close to Kosi Bay, Tembe Elephant Park and the Mozambique border post.
